changeSet.author: openelis-tradmed

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.system_role WHERE name = 'TMMRD Lab Technician'

changeSet.comment: Add Lab Technician role for TMMRD lab technical operations

column.name: description
column.value: Performs technical work: sample prep, extraction, analysis, testing

column.name: grouping_parent
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM clinlims.system_role WHERE name = 'Lab Unit Roles')

changeSet.author: openelis-tradmed

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.system_role WHERE name = 'TMMRD Researcher'

changeSet.comment: Add Researcher role for TMMRD research and method development

column.name: description
column.value: Conducts research and method development in Traditional Medicine lab

column.name: grouping_parent
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM clinlims.system_role WHERE name = 'Lab Unit Roles')

changeSet.author: openelis-tradmed

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.system_role WHERE name = 'TMMRD Pharmacognosist'

changeSet.comment: Add Pharmacognosist role for TMMRD authentication and formulation approval

column.name: grouping_parent
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM clinlims.system_role WHERE name = 'Lab Unit Roles')

changeSet.author: openelis-tradmed

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.system_role WHERE name = 'TMMRD Lab Manager'

changeSet.comment: Add Lab Manager role for TMMRD laboratory supervision and final approval

column.name: description
column.value: Supervises lab operations and provides final approval

column.name: grouping_parent
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM clinlims.system_role WHERE name = 'Lab Unit Roles')

changeSet.author: openelis-tradmed

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.system_role WHERE name = 'TMMRD Principal Investigator'

changeSet.comment: Add Principal Investigator role for TMMRD research oversight

column.name: description
column.value: Oversees research projects with view-only and approval authority

column.name: grouping_parent
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM clinlims.system_role WHERE name = 'Lab Unit Roles')
